project.name: roadtripper
project.description: Road trip planner using Urban Explorer database with persona-based recommendations

current_phase.last_session_work: Session 6: MVP loop closer shipped. recomputeRouteAction Server Action (src/app/plan/actions.ts) — discriminated-union return, 3-layer rate limit (burst/spacing/daily quota), validate-before-quota, error enum. computeRouteWithStops in directions.ts — never spreads client objects, omits empty intermediates, no optimizeWaypointOrder. Client trip state in PlanWorkspace via useState<TripStop[]>; liveRoute: DirectionsResult | null; requestIdRef latest-wins guard. PolylineRenderer split into 4 effects (geometry / opacity / candidate markers / numbered trip markers); hasFitOnceRef so recomputes redraw line in place without camera churn. Add city button at city group header in RecommendationList. New Itinerary component renders ABOVE recommendations when stops>0. Stale-recs banner per Council PROD-1. Error banner with Retry per PROD-3. Pending UI per PROD-4. formatDistance/formatDuration extracted to format.ts (no re-export from server-only directions.ts). next.config.ts adds serverActions.allowedOrigins. Council pre-EXECUTE gate ran: Sec 6/10, Arch 6/10 C, Prod 7/10 — all CONDITIONAL → 18 blocker findings → all folded into ISC and addressed. Simplify post-EXECUTE pass caught 6 fixes (biggest: polyline opacity in-place setOptions instead of full rebuild). 60/60 ISC pass. Lint/type-check/build all green. Pushed to origin/main as 1bc3270. App Hosting deploy in progress at re-check time.
current_phase.next_action: Session 7: Recommendation refresh after stop selection. The Council PROD-1 stale-recs banner ('Showing stops along your original route') is the trust gap to close. Build a Server Action that re-fetches candidate cities + waypoints based on the new polyline after each Add. Likely shape: extend recomputeRouteAction to ALSO return refreshed waypointFetch (single round trip, single rate-limit charge), client updates the waypointFetch slice, banner removed. Architecture: reuse findCandidateCities + fetchWaypointsForCandidates with the new polyline. Watch: cache invalidation (waypoints LRU is keyed by sorted cityIds — different polyline → different candidate set → cache miss is correct), Firestore read budget, IN query 30-id cap.

foundation: Next.js 16 project init with TypeScript + Tailwind
Firebase/Firestore connection to urbanexplorer named database
Google Maps API setup with route display
core: Route calculation via Google Maps Directions API
Stop recommendation engine (query waypoints within +/- 60 min of route)
Dynamic route recalculation on stop selection
personas: Persona selector UI (outdoorsman, foodie, gearhead, culture, nerd)
Persona-to-vibe mapping (Urban Explorer vibeClass + waypoint categories)
Filtered recommendations based on active persona
Persona-themed route line colors and markers
polish: Multi-day itinerary view with day dividers

completed_features: Google Maps RouteMap with Directions renderer
/plan page with Routes API v2 server action
Stop recommendation engine (geometric + Routes API computeRouteMatrix)
Tier 1 council remediation (input validation, rate limit, samplePolyline interpolation, projectOntoPolyline precision, scaled detour cap, LRU cache)
Persona system (5 personas with typeWeights + preferredVibes + accentColor)
fetchWaypointsForCandidates with dedicated LRU cache + nested field projection
Tier 2 council fixes (labeled candidate markers, click-to-highlight, hover sync)
Persona lifted to client state via history.replaceState (avoids server re-run)
Server Action recomputeRouteAction with 3-layer rate limit + error enum
computeRouteWithStops with intermediates (no spread / no optimize)
Trip state in PlanWorkspace (TripStop[], 7-stop cap, dedupe)
Add city to trip button per city group
Itinerary component (ordered stops, Remove, failed-stop indicator, empty state)
PolylineRenderer split into 4 effects + fit-bounds-once + in-place opacity
Session 6 council pre-EXECUTE gate (18 blockers addressed)
resume_instructions: Session 5 complete. Persona system is live end-to-end. Key files: src/lib/personas/{types,index}.ts, src/lib/routing/{recommend,scoring}.ts, src/components/{PersonaSelector,RecommendationList,PlanWorkspace}.tsx. Runtime verification pending (needs browser with real Google Maps key): confirm persona swap reorders the list visibly, candidate marker labels render, click-highlight works, hover sync works. Critical architectural lesson: in Next.js 16 App Router, force-dynamic + router.replace on a searchParam re-runs the Server Component — if you need instant client state (like persona swap), use window.history.replaceState and client-side useState instead. Next: Session 6 — Stop selection + route recalculation. This closes the core loop and is MVP. Will need trip state (zustand or React context), Add-to-trip button, Directions API waypoints param, dynamic polyline updates, Itinerary component.
